test-method.name: testLoginUserWithCorrectEmailAndPassword
test-method.description: TC2: Login User with correct email and password

test-method.name: testLoginWithInvalidCredentials
test-method.description: TC3: Login User with incorrect email and password

test-method.name: testRegisterNewUserAndDeleteAccount
test-method.description: TC1: Register new user with valid details and delete account

test-method.name: testRegisterWithEmptyEmail
test-method.description: TC5: Register with empty email should not proceed

test-method.name: testRegisterWithEmptyName
test-method.description: TC4: Register with empty name should not proceed

test-method.name: testRegisterWithExistingEmail
test-method.description: TC3: Register with existing email shows error

test-method.name: testRegisterWithExistingEmailShowsError
test-method.description: TC7: Register user with existing email shows error

test-method.name: testRegisterWithInvalidEmail
test-method.description: TC6: Register with invalid email format should not proceed

test-method.name: testRegisterWithMrsTitle
test-method.description: TC2: Register with Mrs title and verify account creation
